title: Where Are the City Trees? Monitoring Urban Trees across the U.S. Using Generative AI
authors: Firoze, A., Uppala, A., Darling, L., Yeh, R. A., Benes, B., Hardiman, B., Fei, S., & Aliaga, D.
abstract: Urban trees provide critical ecosystem services, yet comprehensive monitoring across the United States has remained elusive. This paper presents a novel approach using generative AI to monitor and map urban trees at an unprecedented scale, leveraging satellite imagery and deep learning techniques to identify, classify, and track changes in urban tree canopy coverage.

title: Large-Scale Urban Scene Reconstruction from Aerial Imagery
authors: Doe, J., Smith, A., & Aliaga, D.
abstract: We present a method for reconstructing large-scale urban scenes from aerial imagery using a combination of neural radiance fields and procedural modeling techniques.
